title: VIZ-PRO Large Fabric Bulletin Board/Foldable Notice Board Felt Gray, 180 X 120 cm, Silver Aluminium Frame
features: [What You Get ] Oversized Grey fabric bulletin board with Overall size 180cm x 120cm ( frame included); Available surface size: 176cm x 116cm ; package size: 121cm x 91cm x 5 cm; Include fixing kits

[High Quality Details] Gray Felt surface, Anti-scratch silver finished aluminum frame, ABS plastic corner with screw-fixing in corners. It can be folded in half for saving a space and more reliable transit. This board will add a classic look to your office or home
[Self-healing Tackable Surface] Felt Surface accepts pins or velcro, holding your pins firmly in place so you can display pictures, notes, schedules, and more without worrying about pins falling out
[Multi-Use] Upgraded Frame design with covers to keep those mounting screws hidden and out of sight. Looks great anywhere including homes, offices, classrooms, dorm rooms, and more
[Easy To Install & Stable] Easy installation with fixing kits, flexible mounting and free of space
description: Product Description VIZ-PRO Felt Bulletin Board Felt notice boards are sober, well-designed and durable. The notice boards are made with felt & fiberboard, very easy to be pinned in, clean & tidy, popular in the whole world. Large Felt Surface Overall size 180 x 120 cm ( frame included), available surface size: 176 x 116 cm, package size: 120 x 90 x 4.5 cm Self-healing felt surface, suitable for all types of pins Silver finished aluminium frame, sturdy and stylish Wall-mount screw kit is included for an simple wall hanging construction Get rid of clutter and create a unique display of photos, reminders, messages, memos, notes, weekly plan, artworks, stickers, postcards and more Previous page Office Supply Great for pinning notice messages, documents, photos, memos, weekly plan, calendars, ticket stubs School Supply Great for pinning paintings, drawings, notes, pictures, information, teaching plans, kind tips Home Supply Great for pinning artworks, stickers, postcards, menus, reminders, DIY or hang small items Next page 1 Office Supply 2 School Supply 3 Home Supply Popular Products from VIZ-PRO Cork Notice Board Add To Basket Lockable Noticeboard Add To Basket Magnetic Whiteboard Add To Basket Double-Sided Whiteboard Add To Basket Easel Whiteboard Add To Basket Mobile Whiteboard Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.4 out of 5 stars 4,490 4.5 out of 5 stars 542 4.5 out of 5 stars 32,205 4.0 out of 5 stars 490 4.4 out of 5 stars 1,325 4.0 out of 5 stars 3,321 Price £20.95 £ 20 . 95 £62.75 £ 62 . 75 £42.90 £ 42 . 90 £65.75 £ 65 . 75 £54.31 £ 54 . 31 £105.00 £ 105 . 00 Board Size 90 X 60 cm 90 X 60 cm 100 X 80 cm 120 X 60 cm 90 X 60 cm 120 X 90 cm Frame Color Silver Silver Silver Silver Black Silver Board Feature Cork Blue Felt Lacquer Lacquer Lacquer Lacquer Magnetic ✘ ✘ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Double-Sided ✘ ✘ ✘ ✔ ✘ ✔
